name: listen
description: Live audio observability — transcribes speech, detects patterns, and responds with gentle nudges

scripts.experts:serve: cd experts && uv run python3 -m experts.serve
scripts.experts:generate: cd experts && uv run python3 -m experts.generate
scripts.experts:train:music: cd experts && uv run python3 -m experts.train --skill music
scripts.experts:train:wellbeing: cd experts && uv run python3 -m experts.train --skill wellbeing
scripts.listen:menubar:build: cd src/listen/menubar && xcodebuild -scheme ListenMenuBar -destination 'platform=macOS' build 2>&1 | tail -5
